title: Universal Gate Implementation Flow
description: A flowchart demonstrating how any basic logic gate (AND, OR, NOT) can be constructed using only NAND gates or only NOR gates, establishing them as universal gates.
relationships: Inputs are routed to NAND gates configured to perform NOT, AND, and OR functions
The output of one NAND gate (inverter) becomes an input for another to create an AND function
De Morgan's Theorem is applied to show logical equivalence to the desired function
